dctools 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

dctools roadmap

Source: ROADMAP.md

Repeated data-science tasks to package as functions. [x] = shipped, [ ] = planned. Grouped by analysis-pipeline stage. Conventions: dplyr surface grammar; arrow/dbplyr for large data; base R where it keeps dependencies low.

1. Ingestion & typing

2. Missingness & sentinels

3. Validation & QC

4. Redundancy & collinearity

5. Cleaning & transformation

6. Outcome & analysis prep

7. Diagnostics & reporting

8. Reproducibility / workflow

9. Model assumptions & diagnostics (regression / GLM)

10. Causal & semiparametric diagnostics

11. Prediction-model performance & validation

12. Simulation & inference utilities

On this page

Developed by David Chen.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
